query:
INSERT INTO projects (title, slug, description, shortDescription, client, completionDate, budget, status, published, galleryImages, metaTitle, metaDescription, metaKeywords, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES ('Downtown Commercial Tower', 'downtown-commercial-tower', '

Downtown Commercial Tower Project

A 40-story mixed-use commercial tower in the heart of the city.

Project Details

  • Height: 500 feet
  • Total Area: 800,000 sq ft
  • Uses: Office, retail, residential
  • Completion: 2024

Our Role

We provided comprehensive BIM coordination and MEP design services, managing coordination between 15+ trades and ensuring zero clash conflicts during construction.

', 'A landmark 40-story mixed-use commercial tower', 'Metropolitan Development Corp', 'June 2024', '$250M+', 'completed', true, '[\"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1486325212027-8081e485255e?w=800\", \"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1486406146926-c627a92ad1ab?w=800\", \"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1486406146926-c627a92ad1ab?w=800\"]', 'Downtown Commercial Tower | IMI DESIGN', 'See our BIM coordination work on this landmark 40-story commercial tower project.', 'commercial tower, BIM, construction, architecture', NOW(), NOW()), ('Healthcare Complex Renovation', 'healthcare-complex-renovation', '

Healthcare Complex Renovation

Major renovation of a 200,000 sq ft healthcare facility.

Project Scope

  • Complete MEP system upgrade
  • New operating rooms
  • Updated patient facilities
  • Enhanced safety systems

Challenges Overcome

Working in an active healthcare facility required careful coordination and minimal disruption. Our BIM models helped plan every phase to ensure continuous operations.

', 'Major renovation of healthcare facility with MEP upgrades', 'Regional Health Services', 'March 2024', '$85M', 'completed', true, '[\"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1576091160550-112173f7f869?w=800\", \"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1576091160550-112173f7f869?w=800\", \"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1576091160550-112173f7f869?w=800\"]', 'Healthcare Complex Renovation | IMI DESIGN', 'See our successful renovation of a major healthcare facility with advanced BIM coordination.', 'healthcare, renovation, BIM, MEP systems', NOW(), NOW()), ('Residential Development Phase 2', 'residential-development-phase-2', '

Residential Development - Phase 2

Phase 2 of a large residential development with 250 units.

Project Features

  • 250 residential units
  • Modern amenities
  • Sustainable design
  • Green spaces

Status

Currently in construction phase with 60% completion. Our BIM coordination ensures smooth progress and quality standards.

', '250-unit residential development in progress', 'Riverside Developments', 'Expected Q4 2026', '$120M', 'ongoing', true, '[\"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1486406146926-c627a92ad1ab?w=800\", \"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1486406146926-c627a92ad1ab?w=800\", \"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1486406146926-c627a92ad1ab?w=800\"]', 'Residential Development Phase 2 | IMI DESIGN', 'Ongoing residential development project with 250 units. See our BIM coordination in action.', 'residential, development, construction, BIM', NOW(), NOW())
command:

See our BIM coordination in action.', 'residential, development, construction, BIM', NOW(), NOW())
